title: F049 — Human-AI Stewardship
caption: Human wisdom and AI capability are shown in reciprocal service under ethical stewardship.
surroundingTextPreview: AI Stewardship and Participatory Intelligence Purpose This chapter connects the FHQCM to AI Freedom Trust, Booksmith AI, author sovereignty, local-first tools, provenance, human judgment, and the ethical role of artificial intelligence as a stewarded capability rather than a replacement for wisdom. AI is treated here neither as savior nor as enemy. It is treated as a powerful participatory instrument that must be governed by human agency, transparency, accountability, and love.
